feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to link screen-painter element to custom table
entry.content:
Hi,

I created an input field using screen painter name 'DATE_AGO' with search helper 'BU_DATE_CHAR', I chose the search helper because I want it like under date format. I have declared in the TOP include a global variable DATA: DATE_AGO TYPE SY-DATUM. 

Now  when I run my project, and I fill that field with date, when I click on enter it automatically clear by it's self, and when I run the debug and I point on the variable name it's empty 00000000.

Here's the affectation of the variable data to the field of my custom table:

 gs_affec_a-date_ago = date_ago.

DATA: DATE_AGO TYPE SY-DATUM.

Please note that I'm not using any clear or something that let the variable be cleared automatically.

entry.title: GOS PNG IN MM03 ERROR
entry.content:
Hi @everyone ,

I am currently working on project where i have to attach png images in mm03 ,

where i was able to attach it with pdf extension but when i tried to attach it as pdf it attach the file but it is corrupted file , anyone have face this before , that will be helpful , please respond as early as possible .

Please refer my previous blog for pdf attachment , i am using same program but i need to attach png/jpeg: 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/facing-issue-in-gos-attachment-for-mm03/qaq-p/14139422

Thanks,

Sanket Gode.

entry.title: how to throw message in webdynpro
entry.content:
Hi there,

We are exploring the options to throw warning message in webdynpro.  Below code is given by AI tool to make it possible.  However, we want to implement it in BADI IF_WD_BADI_DOMODIFYVIEW~WDDOMODIFYVIEW. The only parameters available within this BADI method are FIRST_TIME, VIEW, WD_CONTEXT.  How can we get the view controller using these parameters? Thanks!

 

DATA: lo_api_controller TYPE REF TO if_wd_controller,
lo_message_manager TYPE REF TO if_wd_message_manager.
lo_api_controller = wd_this->wd_get_api( ).
lo_message_manager = lo_api_controller->get_message_manager( ).
lo_message_manager->report_warning(
  EXPORTING
message_text = 'This is a warning message.'
).

entry.title: Published API for simulating supplier invoice posting in S4/HANA private edition
entry.content:
Hi All,

Are there any published APIs or ways where we can simulate the posting of a supplier Invoice in MIRO or FB60 or ? Our client has an external system through which the supplier invoice data would be posted and prior to that would want to simulate the posting. Any suggestions would be really appreciated.

Regards,
Shravan Chintapatla

entry.title: Error generating Excel on Statutory Report IN_GSTR1_DCL
entry.content:
Good Morning,

I'm actually facing a problem when copying the Statutory Report IN_GSTR1_DCL and running it, when I execute the standard it generates an Excel file but when I run the Z it doesn't generate it, maybe I'm missing some configuration?

I copied the Report and went to SPRO to assign the new one like the standard and the Storage Repository is already configured and running.

When I execute it returns the following message

entry.title: Using enhancement point MM06E005, I wrote code in the exit EXIT_SAPMM06E_012 have promblem?
entry.content:
Using enhancement point MM06E005, I wrote code in the exit EXIT_SAPMM06E_012 to restrict price modifications after approval. This works correctly in ME23N and ME22N, but there is an issue when using ME22 and ME23:

You are trying to use screen 0111 in program "SAPLXM06". This screen does not exist.

However, I don’t need to use screen 0111 at all — it’s not required. How can I resolve this?

entry.title: ATC - Sap readiness check for 2023 S4 - error The SAP-owned namespace /0SJ1P/ is in scope. SAP objec
entry.content:
Hello All - 

 

we are running ATC for custom objects in brownfield approach , we are getting error as below - 
The SAP-owned namespace /0SJ1P/ is in scope. SAP objects cannot be checked in this case.

 

these error are appearing , when we are running for VOFM routein .. 
now the challenge is  - /0SJ1P/ in table "TRNSPACE " is have following values - 

NAMESPACE /0SJ1P/

ROLE P
LICENSE
EDITFLAG X
SSCRFLAG
SAPFLAG X
GEN ONLY
MT TYPE

i ve checked multiple blogs , there has been no solution provide people has tried multiple things , but still a final solution and approach is missing .


thanks

entry.title: 在采购预制发票过账时(MIRO)出现过账完成财务凭证已生成 但发票状态还是预制状态 并且还能继续过账
entry.content: 有几张采购预制发票出现了特殊情况 采购预制发票界面 点击过账  过账成功生成了财务凭证 但是预制发票仍然是可修改的状态 查询后台表RBKP 发现预制发票的状态仍然是预制状态并未变成已过账状态 并且还能继续点击过账按钮 继续生成凭证 重复生成的凭证影响到了财务报表的生成 且重复生成的凭证凭证信息有缺失

entry.title: Facing F4 Help issue in object page of RAP Application
entry.content:
SAP System version - S4 HANA 2022
system's - SAP UI5 version - 1.108
code snippet -

Please help me to solve this issue.
I have used Odata v2 where im facing this issue, but in Odata V4 there is no issue.

entry.title: Fetch Destination configuration details from BTP in ABAP layer
entry.content:
We are configuring destinations in BTP environment in order to fetch details from External API. There is an additional section namely additional properties in destination configuration level where we can fill in relevant parameters along with its key.

In ABAP how can we fetch the same?

We are in ABAP Cloud environment. 

CL_HTTP_DESTINATION_PROVIDER=>CREATE_BY_CLOUD_DESTINATION is not bring the details related to additional properties.

Inside the same class, there is an usage of Class CL_CLOUD_DESTINATION however its API state is not released hence cannot be used independently in Cloud system.

Kindly help here.

entry.title: MRP to create purchase requisition : BADI MD_PURREQ_CHANGE to add G/L Account & Costcenter
entry.content:
Hi ABAP gurus, 

The requirement is change the account assignment category and add G/L Account & Cost center on the new purchase requisition created by triggering MRP ( MD03 ) .

I am able to change the change the Account Assignment Category ( KNTTP ) through the BADI implementation of MD_PURREQ_CHANGE in the Method CHANGE_BEFORE_SAVE_MRP  using  ch_eban-knttp  BUT in the same method the fields G/L Account ( ch_ebkn-sakto )  & Cost center ( ch_ebkn-kostl ) are also there for which i am passing the desired valid values.

However, G/L Account & Cost center are not getting updated. I went through the sap reference note for this SAP Note Number : 1824615 and am using CH_CHANGED = 'X' and  account assignment category (  ch_eban-knttp ) is successfully getting updated. 

BADI ME_PROCESS_REQ_CUST METHOD PROCESS_ACCOUNT will not get triggered here because ME_PROCESS_REQ_CUST  is designed specifically for dialog transactions (ME51N, ME52N) where a user is interacting with the screen. MRP is a background process that does not use the same screen logic, so it doesn't call  ME_PROCESS_REQ_CUST BAdI.

Sample code screenshot below :

How can G/L Account & Cost center be added to the new  purchase requisition creation process using triggering of MRP ( MD03 )  using SAP ABAP ?  

Would be grateful to your replies. 

Thanks,

Devendra

entry.title: Enhanement on BP REL Handler class : MDG
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

For one of our requirement, we need to filter the relationship category and observed that when we open the customer in MDG UI, it lookup on class CL_MDG_BS_BP_HANDLER and method QUERY_BP_REL.

Observed that there is a select query inside this method manipulates it.

Checked few of the SAP NOTES and observed there is no filteration in terms of fetching entry for relationship.

Hope, we can do the implicit enhancement for this guy to do the filteration.

NOTE: We dont want to do the filteration post select query

Kindly suggest the same. Thanks

Block : uibb : relationship

entry.title: DB Operation SELECT found (BSEG, see Note(s):0002431747) - ATC - S4 readiness
entry.content:
ALL -  during ATC run - error for below in the custom code

Appl. Comp. Check / Check Class / Message Code

BC-DWB-CEX-CCM / CL_CI_TEST_S4H_SEARCH_DB_OPS / SELECT

Details of Analysis

  • DB Operation SELECT found (BSEG, see Note(s):0002431747)

 

  • Finding can be suppressed with pseudo comment "#EC CI_DB_OPERATION_OK[2431747]
  • Referenced Object: BSEG (TABL)
  • Referenced Application Component: FI-GL-GL
  • Change Category of Piecelist Items: T (Technical)
  • SAP Note Number: 0002431747 (General Ledger: Incompatible changes in S
  • Simplification Item Category: I (Syntactically incompatible change of existing functionality)

 

is the above error ( red flag ) in the ATC need to ignore if so what we need to consider - 

 

- Since we are reading data from the BKPF/BSEG - that is for the GL account hence we are good ?

- there is no update / modify , insert - so we are good ?

- SAP recommend the data will still persist in BKPF/BSEG,  equivalent API & CDS are not required ? 

 

#abaper community - how are you handling it ... 

thanks

aakash

entry.title: BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE performance issues
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are having serious performance issues when using BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE (from a Z program) .

As far we can see, the call to the function is quite standard but it is really quite slow processing Sales documents (we can have hundreds of items per each document). 

Any ideas? Does anybody else have this type of problem?

TIA,

Luis

entry.title: Remove dms (PDF) in transaction CV02N. ERROR 26 035.
entry.content:
Hi!

I need to develop a routine to remove dms (PDF) in transaction CV02N but I couldn't do it through SHDB.
I'm using the BAPIs 'BAPI_DOCUMENT_GETDETAIL2' 'BAPI_DOCUMENT_CHANGE2', checking 'documentfiles-deletevalue' and 'documentdata-deleteindicator'. However, it's showing error 26 035.
Does anyone know how I can solve this problem?
Or suggest another alternative.
Thanks!

entry.title: Modify statement in a determination giving short dump, going in infinite loop.
entry.content:
I have a single determination in my behavior definition as follows,

determination setCountryCode on save { field Country; create; update; }

following is the implementation in behavior pool,

CLASS lhc_ZI_INVESTOR DEFINITION INHERITING FROM cl_abap_behavior_handler.
  PRIVATE SECTION.

    METHODS get_global_authorizations FOR GLOBAL AUTHORIZATION
      IMPORTING REQUEST requested_authorizations FOR zi_investor RESULT result.

    METHODS setcountrycode FOR DETERMINE ON save
      IMPORTING keys FOR zi_investor~setcountrycode.

ENDCLASS.

CLASS lhc_ZI_INVESTOR IMPLEMENTATION.

METHOD setCountryCode.


    READ ENTITIES OF zi_investor IN LOCAL MODE
      ENTITY zi_investor
        FIELDS ( Country Mobile )
        WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
      RESULT DATA(lt_mobile).

    IF lt_mobile IS NOT INITIAL.

      LOOP AT lt_mobile ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_mobile>).

        IF <fs_mobile>-Country = 'India'.
          <fs_mobile>-Mobile = |+91 | & |{ <fs_mobile>-Mobile }|.
        ENDIF.

      ENDLOOP.

    ENDIF.

    MODIFY ENTITIES OF zi_investor IN LOCAL MODE
      ENTITY zi_investor
        UPDATE FIELDS ( Mobile )
        WITH VALUE #( FOR item IN lt_mobile ( %tky = item-%tky Mobile = item-Mobile ) ).

  ENDMETHOD.

ENDCLASS.

This modify statement at the end is somehow going in an infinte loop, how can I fix this, I saw one post but there, two determinations were calling each other, but here I only have a single determination, I also have a validation but that should not be relevant, please help, thanks.

entry.title: CL_FDT_XL_SPREADSHEET: Alternatives to SET_NAMED_RANGE_VALUES for large Excel inserts
entry.content: Has anyone ever used the method IF_FDT_DOC_SPREADSHEET~SET_NAMED_RANGE_VALUES from class CL_FDT_XL_SPREADSHEET to insert data into an Excel file? I’m finding it extremely slow when working with ranges of around 1,000 rows. Has anyone found faster alternatives, especially when handling Excel data as base64 (e.g., for download or upload scenarios)?

entry.title: How to connect my BTP Trial ABAP Account to BAS Trial Account Dev Space and Generate Fiori App?
entry.content:
Hi SAP SCN Members,

I have an ABAP BTP Trial account and I have created a few ABAP RAP based ODATA services with the UI annotations. Now I want to connect this system with my BAS Dev space and use the Fiori Elements Generator. But when I try to configure the "Data Source and Service Selection" I get this error message -"Discovering ABAP Environments failed. Please ensure you are logged into Cloud Foundry (see https://docs.cloudfoundry.org/cf-cli/getting-".

Can someone guide me to some SAP tutorial or post that can help solve this issue for me? 

 

Thanks,

Prasenjit Singh Bist

entry.title: FNM1 TCODE can not able to use validation with information message
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I am having the requirement to get the information message in tcode FNM1 when validation fails. However, when I use the information message in the if_ex_Fvd_loan_post~customer_initial_check  the information message is getting captured in the return table and once the control gets out of this method, it is considering Information,warning messages as ERROR message and further not allowing the posting.  I can bypass it , as it is s4hana by converting the error indicator 'X' with space but how can I get the information message functionality. I have tried with all the function modules related to messages inside this method. But it is getting dump when the fm is called.  Can someone help me with it ?

entry.title: GR posting against HU based Inbound delivery
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have a requirement to perform GR wrt HU based IBD and Goods movement status should be updated in IBD w.r.t the inbound idoc 944 received from 3PL.

We have seen multiple blogs relating to this but could not get anything on this. Tried with different message types like DESADV, SHPCON and MBGMCR but we are not able to Post GR .

 With MBGMCR a dump is raised with VL 143 message.  checked the note-2904171 and it does not help still.

Just  wanted to know if anyone have worked on this scenario. Thank you.

Karthik
